title: Locator Head Mobs
description: Locator Head Mobs displays nearby hostile mobs and players as head icons on a radar bar at the locator XP bar. Icons are positioned relative to your orientation, and arrows indicate if an entity is above or below you.
body:
# Locator Head Mobs

**See what's hunting you — before it's too late.**

Locator Head Mobs adds a radar-style HUD that displays the heads of nearby hostile mobs and players directly on your XP bar. Know exactly where threats are coming from without breaking your immersion.

---

## 🎯 How it works

Every nearby hostile mob and player appears as a head icon on your XP bar. The position of each icon reflects the entity's direction relative to where **you** are looking — glance at the bar and instantly know what's around you.

- Icon on the **left** → threat is to your left
- Icon on the **right** → threat is to your right
- Icon in the **center** → threat is directly in front or behind you
- **Arrow above** the icon → entity is above you
- **Arrow below** the icon → entity is below you

---

## 👾 Supported Mobs

All vanilla hostile mobs are supported, including:

- Classic hostiles: Zombie, Skeleton, Creeper, Spider, Cave Spider, Witch, Enderman...
- Nether mobs: Blaze, Ghast, Magma Cube, Piglin, Piglin Brute, Hoglin, Zoglin, Strider, Zombified Piglin...
- Illagers: Pillager, Vindicator, Evoker, Illusioner, Ravager, Vex...
- Ocean threats: Guardian, Elder Guardian, Drowned...
- Bosses: Wither, Ender Dragon, Warden, Elder Guardian...
- Recent additions: Breeze, Bogged, Creaking...

---

## 🔧 Technical details

- **Client-side only** — no server installation required
- **Fabric** mod loader
- Textures are loaded asynchronously from Mojang's skin servers — no performance impact
- Compatible with any resource pack
